entities.name: CHICKPEA
entities.description: Cicer arietinum L., the crop studied for phenological and productivity traits

entities.name: PHENOLOGY
entities.description: The study of cyclic and seasonal natural phenomena in plants, important for adaptation to environments

entities.name: FLOWERING TIME
entities.description: The duration until the plant flowers, used as a selection criterion for early maturity

entities.name: DAYS TO POD INITIATION
entities.description: The number of days from sowing to the start of pod formation

entities.name: DAYS TO MATURITY
entities.description: The number of days from sowing to the maturity of the crop

entities.name: PLANT HEIGHT
entities.description: The vertical measurement of the plant

entities.name: BIOMASS
entities.description: The total biological mass of the plant

entities.name: NUMBER OF PODS PER PLANT
entities.description: The count of pods produced by a single plant

entities.name: NUMBER OF SEEDS PER PLANT
entities.description: The count of seeds produced by a single plant

entities.name: GRAIN YIELD PER PLANT
entities.description: The weight of grain produced by a single plant

entities.name: 100-SEED WEIGHT
entities.description: The weight of 100 seeds, used as an indicator of seed size

entities.name: HARVEST INDEX
entities.description: The ratio of harvested grain to total above-ground biomass

entities.name: CROSSES
entities.description: The process of breeding different genetic lines to create segregating populations

entities.name: BREEDING
entities.description: The science of changing plant traits to produce desired characteristics

entities.name: F2 AND F3 SEGREGATING POPULATIONS
entities.description: Generations of offspring derived from genetic crosses used for trait analysis
